ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Name of the organism the gene belongs to */,
  "repr_id" TEXT /* Reference ID for the gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "functional_description" TEXT /* Functional description of the gene */,
  "chromosome" INTEGER /* Chromosome number of the gene */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand orientation of the gene (+ or -) */,
  "gene_type" TEXT /* Type of gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organisms" (
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organism */,
  "organism_name" TEXT /* Name of the organism */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom of the organism */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum of the organism */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the organism */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the organism */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the organism */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the organism */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expression entry */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene the expression data belongs to */,
  "hf" REAL /* Value of the HF column */,
  "ev" REAL /* Value of the EV column */,
  "bs" INTEGER /* Value of the BS column */,
  "tissue_type" INTEGER /* ID of the tissue type where the gene is expressed */,
  "developmental_stage" INTEGER /* ID of the developmental stage at which the gene is expressed */,
  "expression_level" INTEGER /* ID of the expression level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_expression_level FOREIGN KEY ("expression_level") REFERENCES expression_levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_developmental_stage FOREIGN KEY ("developmental_stage") REFERENCES developmental_stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_tissue_type FOREIGN KEY ("tissue_type") REFERENCES tissues ("tissue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functional_descriptions" (
  "description_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each description */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene the description belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Functional description of the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("description_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_functional_descriptions_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orthologs" (
  "ortholog_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ortholog */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene the ortholog belongs to */,
  "agi_code" TEXT /* AGI code for the Arabidopsis ortholog */,
  "arabidopsis_gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the Arabidopsis ortholog */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ortholog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orthologs_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "other_databases" (
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database link */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene the link belongs to */,
  "database_name" TEXT /* Name of the database */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the database entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("database_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_other_databases_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene the annotation belongs to */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Annotation of the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_annotations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expression_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expression entry the value belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the expression */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_values_expression_id FOREIGN KEY ("expression_id") REFERENCES gene_expression ("expression_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tissues" (
  "tissue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tissue type */,
  "tissue_name" TEXT /* Name of the tissue type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tissue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developmental_stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developmental stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the developmental stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expression_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expression level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the expression level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "gene1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first gene involved in the interaction */,
  "gene2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second gene involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., activation, inhibition, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_interactions_gene2_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene2_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_interactions_gene1_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene1_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathways" (
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pathway */,
  "pathway_name" TEXT /* Name of the pathway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_tissues" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "tissue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tissue type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id", "tissue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_stages" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developmental stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id", "stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_interactions_gen1" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id", "interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_pathways" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pathway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id", "pathway_id")
)
